description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On August 21, 2025 at 12:04 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Inglewood, California was in a collision 
involving vegetation in an alley behind S. Turo Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling westbound in an alley behind S. Turo Avenue and proceeding to pass to the right of a passenger car that was 
parked facing east. As the Waymo AV was maneuvering around the passenger car, the right of the Waymo AV made contact with 
vegetation growing on the north wall of the alley and extending into the roadway. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS 
was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
